summary: Plan-only classification for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because the artifact does not contain complete merge preflight proof for any PR; several PRs also have failing checks, unresolved review-bot/history signals, waiting-on-author state, or broad code delta.

actions.reason: Independent install-script PR with useful scoped work, but not merge-ready under merge policy.
Waiting-on-author state plus failing validation requires maintainer/author follow-up before repair or merge planning.
Independent scoped gateway diagnostics PR, but merge is blocked by incomplete review/comment proof and a failing listed check.
Broad code delta and auth-provider/runtime scope are explicit require_human conditions for this job unless a complete merge preflight is available.
Independent session-state PR with useful scoped work, but merge is blocked by failing proof/checks and unresolved review-bot proof.

needs_human: #93686: waiting-on-author state plus failing check-lint/check-prod-types needs author or maintainer decision before repair/merge.
